query: SELECT u.id, u.idTag, it.id_tag FROM users u LEFT JOIN id_tags it ON u.id = it.user_id AND u.idTag = it.id_tag WHERE u.idTag IS NOT NULL AND it.id IS NULL;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3kTaiYRMPpnS3sR.17f9e41a6e58 --database UcUrociZeo4QVAHHN9vAuZ --execute SELECT u.id, u.idTag, it.id_tag FROM users u LEFT JOIN id_tags it ON u.id = it.user_id AND u.idTag = it.id_tag WHERE u.idTag IS NOT NULL AND it.id IS NULL;
